revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Current consorts of sovereigns |state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |title = [[List of current consorts of sovereigns|Current consorts of sovereigns]] |listclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [['Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group5 = Oceania |list5 = *{{flagicon|Australia}} {{flagicon|New Zealand}} {{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} {{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} {{flagicon|Tuvalu}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]] *{{flagicon|Tonga}} [[Nanasipauʻu Tukuʻaho]] |below = ''See also : [[List of current monarchs of sovereign states]] - [[:Category:Royal consorts]] - [[:Category:Queens consort]]'' }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} == See also == * [[Template:Sovereigns of monarchies]] * [[Template:Current heirs of monarchies]]
[[Category:Royalty and nobility navigational boxes]] [[Category:People by marriage templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Current consorts of sovereigns |state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |title = [[List of current consorts of sovereigns|Current consorts of sovereigns]] |listclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[:en:'Masenate Mohato Seeiso|'Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group5 = Oceania |list5 = *{{flagicon|Australia}} {{flagicon|New Zealand}} {{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} {{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} {{flagicon|Tuvalu}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]] *{{flagicon|Tonga}} [[Nanasipauʻu Tukuʻaho]] |below = ''See also : [[List of current monarchs of sovereign states]] - [[:Category:Royal consorts]] - [[:Category:Queens consort]]'' }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} == See also == * [[Template:Sovereigns of monarchies]] * [[Template:Current heirs of monarchies]]
[[Category:Royalty and nobility navigational boxes]] [[Category:People by marriage templates]] </noinclude>

|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group5 = Oceania |list5 = *{{flagicon|Australia}} {{flagicon|New Zealand}} {{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} {{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} {{flagicon|Tuvalu}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]] *{{flagicon|Tonga}} [[Nanasipauʻu Tukuʻaho]] |below = ''See also : [[List of current monarchs of sovereign states]] - [[:Category:Royal consorts]] - [[:Category:Queens consort]]'' }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} == See also == * [[Template:Sovereigns of monarchies]] * [[Template:Current heirs of monarchies]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Current consorts of sovereigns |state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |title = [[List of current consorts of sovereigns|Current consorts of sovereigns]] |listclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[:en:'Masenate Mohato Seeiso|'Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[:en:Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]

|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[:en:'Masenate Mohato Seeiso|'Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[:en:Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[:en:Brigitte Macron|Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[:en:Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[:en:Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group5 = Oceania |list5 = *{{flagicon|Australia}} {{flagicon|New Zealand}} {{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} {{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} {{flagicon|Tuvalu}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]] *{{flagicon|Tonga}} [[Nanasipauʻu Tukuʻaho]] |below = ''See also : [[List of current monarchs of sovereign states]] - [[:Category:Royal consorts]] - [[:Category:Queens consort]]'' }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} == See also == * [[Template:Sovereigns of monarchies]] * [[Template:Current heirs of monarchies]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Current consorts of sovereigns |state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |title = [[List of current consorts of sovereigns|Current consorts of sovereigns]] |listclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[:en:'Masenate Mohato Seeiso|'Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[:en:Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[:en:Brigitte Macron|Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[:en:Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[:en:Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group5 = Oceania |list5 = *{{flagicon|Australia}} {{flagicon|New Zealand}} {{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} {{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} {{flagicon|Tuvalu}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]] *{{flagicon|Tonga}} [[Nanasipauʻu Tukuʻaho]] |below = ''See also : [[List of current monarchs of sovereign states]] - [[:Category:Royal consorts]] - [[:Category:Queens consort]]'' }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} == See also == * [[Template:Sovereigns of monarchies]] * [[Template:Current heirs of monarchies]]
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Current consorts of sovereigns |state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |title = [[List of current consorts of sovereigns|Current consorts of sovereigns]] |listclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[:en:'Masenate Mohato Seeiso|'Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[:en:Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[:en:Brigitte Macron|Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[:en:Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[:en:Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group5 = Oceania |list5 = *{{flagicon|Australia}} {{flagicon|New Zealand}} {{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} {{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} {{flagicon|Tuvalu}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]] *{{flagicon|Tonga}} [[Nanasipauʻu Tukuʻaho]] |below = ''See also : [[List of current monarchs of sovereign states]] - [[:Category:Royal consorts]] - [[:Category:Queens consort]]'' }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} == See also == * [[Template:Sovereigns of monarchies]] * [[Template:Current heirs of monarchies]]
</noinclude>

|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[:en:Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Current consorts of sovereigns |state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |title = [[List of current consorts of sovereigns|Current consorts of sovereigns]] |listclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[:en:'Masenate Mohato Seeiso|'Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[:en:Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[:en:Brigitte Macron|Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[:en:Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[:en:Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]

</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Current_consorts_of_sovereigns here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Current_consorts_of_sovereigns for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox |name = Current consorts of sovereigns |state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |title = [[List of current consorts of sovereigns|Current consorts of sovereigns]] |listclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Africa |list1 = *{{flagicon|Eswatini}} [[Succession to the Swazi throne|11 wives]] including [[Sibonelo Mngometulu]], [[Zena Mahlangu]], and [[Sindiswa Dlamini]] *{{flagicon|Lesotho}} [[:en:'Masenate Mohato Seeiso|'Masenate Mohato Seeiso]]
|group2 = Americas |list2 = *{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Grenada}} {{flagicon|Saint Vincent and the Grenadines}} {{flagicon|Belize}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|Bahamas}} {{flagicon|Saint Lucia}} {{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group3 = Asia |list3 = *{{flagicon|Bahrain}} 4 wives (including [[Sabika bint Ibrahim Al Khalifa|Sabika]]) *{{flagicon|Bhutan}} [[Jetsun Pema]] *{{flagicon|Brunei}} [[Queen Saleha of Brunei|Saleha]] *{{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress Masako|Masako]] *{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[Queen Rania of Jordan|Rania]] *{{flagicon|Kuwait}} 2 wives (Nuria and Munira) *{{flagicon|Malaysia}} [[Raja Zarith Sofiah|Zarith Sofiah]] *{{flagicon|Oman}} [[:en:Ahad bint Abdullah|Ahad]] *{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[Jawaher bint Hamad Al Thani|Jawaher]], [[:en:Al-Anoud bint Mana Al Hajri|Al-Anoud]], and [[Noora bint Hathal Al Dosari|Noora]] *{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[Fahda bint Falah Al Hithlain|Fahda]] *{{flagicon|Thailand}} [[Suthida]] and [[Sineenat]] *{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[Salama bint Hamdan Al Nahyan|Salama]]
|group4 = Europe |list4 = * {{flagicon|Andorra}} [[:en:Brigitte Macron|Brigitte Macron]] * {{flagicon|Belgium}} [[Queen Mathilde of Belgium|Mathilde]] * {{flagicon|Denmark}} [[Queen Mary of Denmark|Mary]] * {{flagicon|Luxembourg}} [[Maria Teresa, Grand Duchess of Luxembourg|Maria Teresa]] * {{flagicon|Monaco}} [[:en:Charlene, Princess of Monaco|Charlene]] * {{flagicon|Kingdom of the Netherlands}} [[:en:Queen Máxima of the Netherlands|Máxima]] * {{flagicon|Norway}} [[Queen Sonja of Norway|Sonja]] * {{flagicon|Spain}} [[Queen Letizia of Spain|Letizia]] * {{flagicon|Sweden}} [[Queen Silvia of Sweden|Silvia]] * {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]]
|group5 = Oceania |list5 = *{{flagicon|Australia}} {{flagicon|New Zealand}} {{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} {{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} {{flagicon|Tuvalu}} [[Queen Camilla|Camilla]] *{{flagicon|Tonga}} [[Nanasipauʻu Tukuʻaho]] |below = ''See also : [[List of current monarchs of sovereign states]] - [[:Category:Royal consorts]] - [[:Category:Queens consort]]'' }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} == See also == * [[Template:Sovereigns of monarchies]] * [[Template:Current heirs of monarchies]]
